basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS)
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 1 Technical Fellow Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on 8th July 2026 at the TANUVAS office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation of 5 years for women/SC/ST/OBC candidates.

qualification.details: M.V.Sc. in any discipline. M.V.Sc in Meat Science / Livestock Products Technology (desirable).

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. + HRA (for 1st and 2nd year) Rs. 42,000/- p.m. + HRA (for 3rd year)

_labels.notification_pdf: Download TANUVAS Technical Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download TANUVAS Technical Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TANUVAS Technical Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TANUVAS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TANUVAS Technical Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TANUVAS Technical Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. + HRA (for 1st and 2nd year) Rs. 42,000/- p.m. + HRA (for 3rd year)

content_sections.heading: TANUVAS Technical Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
TANUVAS Technical Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for TANUVAS Technical Fellow Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: TANUVAS Technical Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the TANUVAS recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the TANUVAS recruitment is TECHNICAL FELLOW. This is a contractual position announced for the Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the TECHNICAL FELLOW post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the TECHNICAL FELLOW post in the Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the TECHNICAL FELLOW position?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the TECHNICAL FELLOW position is M.V.Sc. in any discipline. M.V.Sc in Meat Science or Livestock Products Technology is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the TECHNICAL FELLOW post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the TECHNICAL FELLOW post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for women, SC, ST, and OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the TECHNICAL FELLOW role?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the TECHNICAL FELLOW role is Rs. 37,000/- p.m. + HRA for the first and second year, and Rs. 42,000/- p.m. + HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 08 July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the TECHNICAL FELLOW post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the TECHNICAL FELLOW post includes a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates must clear both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: For the Walk-in Interview, you should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).
